execution_order: ContentEngine: finish the one remaining merged-main proof check before reopening anything else.

RealEstate: reconcile the preserved dirty branch onto origin/main, then capture fresh proof.

blockers: ContentEngine still has an unresolved merged-main desktop-ci proof run from March 24, 2026.
CryptForge still needs fresh post-fix ci-nightly evidence even though the fix is already merged.
Construction and RealEstate both require preserved-branch reconciliation before fresh proof can count.
Construction also has a new post-batch Dependabot PR #4 that should stay separate from the branch-reconciliation lane.
Historical failed-workflow counts from the source docs should stay historical unless the latest current run still points to the same blocker.
done_definition: FreeLanceInvoice and StatusPage remain closed for this bucket because their completed slices are already proven and no active GitHub blocker remains.
ContentEngine is done when the March 24, 2026 merged-main desktop-ci run completes green, with no need to reopen product scope unless that run fails.
Construction is done when the preserved dirty branch is reconciled onto origin/main, fresh reconciled-branch proof passes, and the new PR #4 is then handled as separate hygiene.
RealEstate is done when the preserved dirty branch is reconciled onto origin/main and fresh reconciled-branch proof passes while the repo stays quiet.
CryptForge is done when the merged Windows nightly fix has fresh post-fix proof and the folder rename is explicitly deferred or completed in a separate lossless move.
